item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa prioritas masyarakat atas hak individu dalam sistem hukum Indonesia terlalu keras.

notes: Agent A opens in favor of society-priority with a rights caveat, shifts at turn 3 into a rights-protective critique of Indonesian society-priority as too harsh, then partially recovers a communal-harmony position at turn 5. Agent B starts rights-first but increasingly acknowledges communal needs, individual responsibility, and limits on privileges by turn 6. Both agents converge toward balance while retaining culturally distinct frames.
